        "  if blood_glucose_level<4.0:\n",

        "  elif blood_glucose_level <11.0:\n",
        "    category = \"Pre-diabetic\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    category = \"Diabetic\"\n",
        "  print(f\"Name:{name}|Age:{age}|Blood glucose level:{blood_glucose_level:.1f}|Category:{category}\")"

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def check_glucose(glucose):\n",
        "  if glucose<4.0:\n",
        "    return \"Low-Hypoglycemia\"\n",
        "  elif glucose <7.0:\n",
        "    return \"Normal\"\n",
        "  elif glucose <11.0:\n",
        "    return \"Pre-diabetic\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"Diabetic\"\n",
        "print(check_glucose(3.0))\n",
        "print(check_glucose(5.5))\n",
        "print(check_glucose(8.0))\n",
        "print(check_glucose(12.0))"
      ],
      "metadata": {

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def check_glucose(glucose):\n",
        "  if glucose <4.0:\n",
        "    return \"Low-Hypoglycemia\"\n",
        "  elif glucose <7.0:\n",
        "    return \"Normal\"\n",
        "  elif glucose <11.0:\n",
        "    return \"Pre-diabetic\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"Diabetic\"\n",
        "def check_bmi(bmi):\n",
        "  if bmi<18.5:\n",
        "    return \"underweight\"\n",
        "  elif bmi<25:\n",
        "    return \"Normal weight\"\n",
        "  elif bmi<30:\n",
        "    return \"overweight\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"obese\"\n",
        "def check_BP(BP):\n",
        "  if BP<90:\n",
        "    return \"Low blood pressure\"\n",
        "  elif BP<120:\n",
        "    return \"Normal blood pressure\"\n",
        "  elif BP<140:\n",
        "    return \"Elevated blood pressure\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"High blood pressure\"\n",
        "# Patients details\n",
        "patient_names = [\"Amina\",\"Biodun\",\"Chibuzor\",\"Damilola\",\"Efosa\"]\n",
        "patient_ages = [32,45,28,54,39]\n",
        "patient_bmis = [17.8,27.3,22.1,31.6,24.8]\n",
        "patient_glucoses = [5.2,8.4,3.8,12.3,6.9]\n",
        "patient_BPs = [125,92,110,148,135]\n",
        "for name,age,bmi,glucose,BP in zip(patient_names, patient_ages, patient_bmis, patient_glucoses, patient_BPs):\n",
        "  bmi_category = check_bmi(bmi)\n",
        "  glucose_category = check_glucose(glucose)\n",
        "  BP_category = check_BP (BP)\n",
        "  print(f\"Patient:{name}|Age:{age}|BMI:{bmi_category}|glucose:{glucose_category}|BP:{BP_category}\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "PuLBATxqjXK7",
        "outputId": "f1fe1cae-4307-4a55-bb71-ef16fc60c7ff"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",

            "Patient:Biodun|Age:45|BMI:overweight|glucose:Pre-diabetic|BP:Normal blood pressure\n",
            "Patient:Chibuzor|Age:28|BMI:Normal weight|glucose:Low-Hypoglycemia|BP:Normal blood pressure\n",
            "Patient:Damilola|Age:54|BMI:obese|glucose:Diabetic|BP:High blood pressure\n",
            "Patient:Efosa|Age:39|BMI:Normal weight|glucose:Normal|BP:Elevated blood pressure\n"
          ]

        "#Adding new column\n",
        "def check_glucose (glucose):\n",
        "  if glucose<4.0:\n",
        "    return \"Low-Hypoglycemia\"\n",
        "  elif glucose<7.0:\n",
        "    return \"Normal\"\n",
        "  elif glucose<11.0:\n",
        "    return \"Pre-diabetic\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"Diabetic\"\n",
        "df[\"Glucose_category\"] = df[\"Glucose\"] . apply(check_glucose)\n",
        "print(df)"
      ],
      "metadata": {

          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

            "0     Amina   32  17.8      5.2  125            Normal\n",
            "1    Biodun   45  27.3      8.4   92      Pre-diabetic\n",
            "2  Chibuzor   28  22.1      3.8  110  Low-Hypoglycemia\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def check_glucose (glucose):\n",
        "  if glucose<4.0:\n",
        "    return \"Low-Hypoglycemia\"\n",
        "  elif glucose<7.0:\n",
        "    return \"Normal\"\n",
        "  elif glucose <11.0:\n",
        "    return \"Pre-diabetic\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"Diabetic\"\n",
        "def check_bmi (bmi):\n",
        "  if bmi < 18.5:\n",
        "    return \"underweight\"\n",
        "  elif bmi < 25:\n",
        "    return \"Normal weight\"\n",
        "  elif bmi < 30:\n",
        "    return \"overweight\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"obese\"\n",
        "def check_BP (BP):\n",
        "  if BP < 90:\n",
        "    return \" Low BP\"\n",
        "  elif BP < 120:\n",
        "    return \"Normal BP\"\n",
        "  elif BP < 140:\n",
        "    return \"Elevated BP\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"High BP\"\n",
        "df[\"Glucose_category\"] =df[\"Glucose\"] . apply(check_glucose)\n",
        "df[\"BMI_category\"] = df[\"BMI\"] . apply(check_bmi)\n",
        "df[\"BP_category\"] = df[\"BP\"] . apply(check_BP)\n",
        "print(df)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "CpfyO4zsvYI-",
        "outputId": "5615bed9-b442-4103-d1a4-4be3c9b268cf"

        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# Columns where zero is impossible\n",
        "columns_to_fix = [\"Glucose\", \"BloodPressure\", \"Age\",\"SkinThickness\", \"Insulin\", \"BMI\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Replace zeros with NaN in those columns\n",
        "df_diabetes[columns_to_fix] = df_diabetes[columns_to_fix].replace(0, np.nan)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Zeros replaced with NaN successfully!\")\n",
        "print(df_diabetes.isnull().sum())"

        "# Create a patient dictionary\n",
        "patient = {\n",

        "    \"glucose\": 8.4,\n",
        "    \"bmi\": 27.3,\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ===== Dictionary Operations =====\n",
        "\n",
        "patient = {\n",
        "    \"name\": \"Biodun\",\n",
        "    \"age\": 45,\n",
        "    \"glucose\": 8.4,\n",
        "    \"bmi\": 27.3,\n",
        "    \"admitted\": True\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Get all keys\n",
        "print(patient.keys())\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Get all values\n",
        "print(patient.values())\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Add a new key\n",
        "patient[\"blood_pressure\"] = 92\n",
        "print(patient)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Update existing value\n",
        "patient[\"glucose\"] = 9.1\n",
        "print(patient[\"glucose\"])\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Check if key exists\n",
        "print(\"bmi\" in patient)\n",
        "print(\"insulin\" in patient)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "Bf9xOJFC1D-M",
        "outputId": "be36ae2a-3354-4dcf-9b3c-9473192cd74b"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "dict_keys(['name', 'age', 'glucose', 'bmi', 'admitted'])\n",
            "dict_values(['Biodun', 45, 8.4, 27.3, True])\n",
            "{'name': 'Biodun', 'age': 45, 'glucose': 8.4, 'bmi': 27.3, 'admitted': True, 'blood_pressure': 92}\n",
            "9.1\n",
            "True\n",
            "False\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# List of patient dictionaries\n",
        "patients = [\n",
        "    {\"name\": \"Biodun\", \"age\": 45, \"glucose\": 8.4},\n",
        "    {\"name\": \"Amina\", \"age\": 32, \"glucose\": 5.2},\n",
        "    {\"name\": \"Chidi\", \"age\": 28, \"glucose\": 3.8}\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Loop through all patients\n",
        "for patient in patients:\n",
        "  print(f\"Name: {patient['name']} | Age: {patient['age']} | Glucose: {patient['glucose']}\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [

            "Name: Amina | Age: 32 | Glucose: 5.2\n",
            "Name: Chidi | Age: 28 | Glucose: 3.8\n"
          ]
        }
      ]

        "\n",
        "def check_glucose(glucose):\n",
        "  if glucose <4.0:\n",
        "    return \"Low-Hypoglycemia\"\n",
        "  elif glucose <7.0:\n",
        "    return \"Normal\"\n",
        "  elif glucose <11.0:\n",
        "    return \"Pre-diabetic\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"Diabetic\"\n",
        "\n",
        "def check_bmi (bmi):\n",
        "  if bmi<18.5:\n",
        "    return \"underweight\"\n",
        "  elif bmi<25:\n",
        "    return \"Normal weight\"\n",
        "  elif bmi<30:\n",
        "    return \"overweight\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"obese\"\n",
        "\n",
        "def check_bp(bp):\n",
        "  if bp<90:\n",
        "    return\"low bp\"\n",
        "  elif bp<120:\n",
        "    return \"normal bp\"\n",
        "  elif bp<140:\n",
        "    return \"elevated bp\"\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    return \"high bp\"\n",
        "\n",
        "patients = [\n",
        "    {\"name\":\"Tola\", \"age\": 20, \"BMI\":40.50,\"bp\":105.46,\"glucose\":4.50},\n",
        "    {\"name\":\"Ade\", \"age\":23, \"BMI\":38.90,\"bp\":56.70,\"glucose\":7.56},\n",
        "    {\"name\":\"Amina\",\"age\":40, \"BMI\":25.60,\"bp\":85.40,\"glucose\":11.5}\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "for patient in patients:\n",
        "  glucose_category = check_glucose(patient[\"glucose\"])\n",
        "  bmi_category =check_bmi(patient[\"BMI\"])\n",
        "  bp_category =check_bp(patient[\"bp\"])\n",
        "  print(f\"Name:{patient['name']} | Age:{patient['age']} | BMI:{patient['BMI']} | BMI category: {bmi_category} | bp:{patient['bp']} | bp category:{bp_category} | glucose:{patient['glucose']} | Glucose category:{glucose_category}\")"
